metadata.title: Build a lovable_build_prompt for finance_ops of a law firm operating in the European Union, using the compliance_lens to ensure full regulatory adherence, with explicit validation gates to handle overbroad_one_pass_lock chaos input.

mission.primary_objective: Build a lovable_build_prompt for finance_ops of a law firm operating in the European Union, using the compliance_lens to ensure full regulatory adherence, with explicit validation gates to handle overbroad_one_pass_lock chaos input.
mission.success_definition: The generated prompt passes all validation gates defined in the artifact.; The prompt can be compiled by SR8 into a structured directive with all required sections.; The prompt correctly interprets and handles ambiguous, urgent, and partially constrained inputs.; The prompt enforces EU compliance requirements for finance operations in a law firm context.; The prompt prevents single-pass lock approval without multi-step verification.

in_scope.item: The prompt must generate a finance operations workflow that includes automated transaction monitoring, client fund segregation, invoice validation, and periodic compliance reporting. It must incorporate EU regulatory frameworks (e.g., GDPR, AML Directives, PSD2) and be resilient to ambiguous, urgent, and partially constrained inputs.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: The generated prompt passes all validation gates defined in the artifact.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: The prompt can be compiled by SR8 into a structured directive with all required sections.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: The prompt correctly interprets and handles ambiguous, urgent, and partially constrained inputs.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: The prompt enforces EU compliance requirements for finance operations in a law firm context.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 5
gate.pass_condition: The prompt prevents single-pass lock approval without multi-step verification.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.app_goal: Build a lovable_build_prompt for finance_ops of a law firm operating in the European Union, using the compliance_lens to ensure full regulatory adherence, with explicit validation gates to handle overbroad_one_pass_lock chaos input.

user_flows.item: The prompt must generate a finance operations workflow that includes automated transaction monitoring, client fund segregation, invoice validation, and periodic compliance reporting. It must incorporate EU regulatory frameworks (e.g., GDPR, AML Directives, PSD2) and be resilient to ambiguous, urgent, and partially constrained inputs.

build_steps.item: The prompt must generate a finance operations workflow that includes automated transaction monitoring, client fund segregation, invoice validation, and periodic compliance reporting. It must incorporate EU regulatory frameworks (e.g., GDPR, AML Directives, PSD2) and be resilient to ambiguous, urgent, and partially constrained inputs.

acceptance_criteria.item: The generated prompt passes all validation gates defined in the artifact.
The prompt can be compiled by SR8 into a structured directive with all required sections.
The prompt correctly interprets and handles ambiguous, urgent, and partially constrained inputs.
The prompt enforces EU compliance requirements for finance operations in a law firm context.
The prompt prevents single-pass lock approval without multi-step verification.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
